results.title: US President Trump announces Iran deal 'complete', Pakistan PM says signing on Friday
results.description: In another post, US President Donald Trump went on to add that the deal will bring peace and security to the whole region. He also announced the opening of the Strait of Hormuz and the immediate lifting of the US naval blockade.

results.title: Trump Announces Iran Deal, Says US Will End Naval Blockade As Tehran Claims Victory | News18
results.description: | Trump announces Iran deal, says US will end naval blockade; Tehran claims victoryUS President Donald Trump announced that the United States and Iran had reached an agreement and said Washington would end its naval blockade of the country, marking the biggest breakthrough in months of negotiations.“The deal with the Islamic Republic of Iran is now complete. Congratulations to all!” Trump said in a post on Truth Social. Iran state TV says Tehran forced the US to accept the peace deal, reports Reuters. The White House did not immediately release details of the agreement n18oc_breaking

results.title: Monsoon likely to enter sluggish phase in Karnataka: IMD
results.description: Monsoon: The India Meteorological Department has said rainfall activity in Karnataka may weaken in the coming days, with scattered showers expected after a brief lull despite recent heavy rain in Bengaluru and coastal regions.

results.title: Wheat procurement over, UP shifts focus to maize purchase
results.description: “The three-month wheat procurement drive ends on June 15 and maize procurement in 26 districts across the state begins the same day,” principal secretary (food and civil supplies) Ranvir Prasad said.

results.title: Karnataka explores levies on second homes, NRIs to fund affordable housing
results.description: Affordable housing: Karnataka is exploring new levies, including higher stamp duty on second homes and NRI buyers, along with fees on vacant sites and development projects, to create a dedicated housing fund.

results.title: YouTuber Vlad Ncl punched during Dublin livestream as video sparks anti trans debate
results.description: Vlad Ncl was punched during a Dublin livestream after a stranger questioned his gender presentation while he was dressed as Natalia. The video quickly spread online, leading to heated debate about public safety, gender bias and prank content. While many condemned the attack, others questioned the risks involved in social experiments. Police have reportedly received video evidence, but no arrest has been announced.
